mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_reactions (message_id, user_id, emoji) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{userId}, #{emoji})
mapper.select: SELECT mr.message_id AS message_id, mr.emoji AS emoji, mr.user_id AS user_id, u.nickname AS user_nickname FROM message_reactions mr JOIN users u ON u.id = mr.user_id WHERE mr.message_id = #{messageId} ORDER BY mr.emoji, mr.created_at
